title: Deliciously Dense Croatian Corn Sandwich
description: A quick-fix Croatian dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, served on a slate-tile vessel.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal, salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add in the water, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes pliable and smooth.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape, about 1/2 inch thick.
Heat the olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Cook the arepas for 4-5 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Fill the arepas with sliced mozzarella cheese and place on the slate-tile vessel.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
